products.title: Best Friends by Sheri Bundle Set The Original Calming Lux Donut Cuddler Cat and Dog Bed + Pet Throw Blanket Dark Chocolate Medium 30" x 30"
products.description:
Features:
- BUNDLE PET GIFTS DEAL: You’ll love the bargain your pets will love the bundl! Best Friends by Sheri brings you an all time favorite; our Calming Donut Cuddler pet bed in Lux fur with a matching Lux fur pet throw blanket. Recommeneded size for pet's weight: small: up to 25 lbs medium: up to 45 lbs large: up to 100 lbs extra large: up to 150 lbs.
- COZY LUXURIOUS SLEEP: Give your cat and dog the bed of their dreams! The plush vegan fur is self-warming and is reminiscent of their mother's fur providing a calming anxiety-relieving space. Provide your animals with ultimate comfort for full restful sleep to encourage improved behavior and better health
- THERAPEUTIC BED DESIGN: With a raised rim and super-soft filling our calming pet bed was carefully crafted to provide orthopedic joint muscle head and neck support. the CoziLOFT fibers used to fill our donut cuddler keep their loft for up to 3x’s longer than standard pet beds.
- ON-THE-GO-SNUGGLES: Pair our Lux pet blanket with our round dog cuddler for the perfect combo for furry friends that like to burrow and dig. If you're on the go our warming dog blanket is versatile and easy to bring along for extra calming support. It also doubles as a furniture protector and dog crate cover.
- MACHINE-WASHABLE: With a water and dirt-resistant bottom our round dog bed helps prevent messes from reaching your floors. When accidents happen or for routine cleaning both the pet bed and furry blanket can be tossed in the washing machine for your convenience. Follow the instructions on the label to ensure proper care.

Give your pet more than just a dog bed! Best Friend’s by Sheri is the original creator of the most popular dog bed that has surfaced the internet in recent years: The Calming Donut Dog Bed. This innovative cuddler shag design provides better sleep, supports joints, and offers a calming, self-warming effect. The donut cuddler is carefully crafted and filled with CoziLOFT fibers, allowing your pet to be instantly enveloped in premium, soft, luxurious comfort. The poly filling in our calming dog bed keeps its loft for up to 3Xs longer than standard pet beds, meaning it provides longer comfort, support and aesthetic appeal. Encouraging a deeper night’s rest or a refreshing daytime nap, our soothing dog bed is special because it’s been carefully designed to provide optimal neck, joint, and muscle support. For dogs and cats who like to burrow, the bed creates a perfect space for cuddles and top-notch snuggling. With a water and dirt-resistant bottom, our calming pet bed helps prevent messes from reaching your floors. When accidents happen, toss the shell or bed (small 23"x23") into the washing machine for easy clean up. Follow the instructions on the label to ensure proper care.

reviews.title: Our Dog's Favorite Bed!!!
reviews.text: I purchased this bed for our 16lb Jack Russell Terrier's recovery. She jumped out of our farm truck on our property and was run over. She ended up with a shattered right hip and broken left. After three surgeries we brought her home and she was very uncomfortable on the bed options we had. I purchased this bed because of the reviews and quick shipping and our pup was finally able to sleep comfortably. She loved it and would only leave it for her bathroom breaks. This bed allowed her to sleep on side or back comfortably. Since I was taking her back and forth to work I purchased a second right away so she had one at home and one for on the go. She healed beautifully and still loves her beds. They are easy to wash, too! I wash and dry on delicate and they clean up like new every time.

reviews.title: An Investment in your Future
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:61efaf73e5b46fd520ac9424f91e086d]] My dogs love this bed and they look especially adorable in it. I keep it in my home office and they take turns snoozing in it throughout the day, which means that I get more time looking at cute dogs while I work, which means that I'm happier, which means that I do better at my job, which means that I'm probably going to get a promotion soon. What I'm trying to say is that this may look like a dog bed but really it's an investment in your future, so you should get it.

reviews.title: Disappointing

I have a 22 pound French Bulldog and once she lays in it it looks like the center has flattened so much she's basically laying on the ground. It's soft and I like the color, but not as full as expected.

reviews.title: Our dog LOVES this bed!
reviews.text:
We had noticed that our dog was starting to look for resting spots that allowed him to have his head propped up, and so we knew we wanted either a donut bed or a bed with raised edges, and we really hit the jackpot with this!

I went back and forth on a LOT of different dog beds and I read SO many reviews. This is the bed we landed on for our 45-pound, 8-year-old beagle/rat terrier/cattle dog mix and he absolutely LOVES it. We decided to opt for the large size so he could stretch out across it if he wanted to. I think he likes that it snuggles him but doesn't cover him, and it's obvious that he loves being able to lean against the sides and he loves being able to rest his head on the sides. We are considering getting a second one of these for him so he can have one in the living room and one in our bedroom! (We end up moving it all around the house so he can hang out with us wherever we are, as you can see in the photos!)

I did follow the instructions that came with this and so I popped into the dryer before we set it up for him. We find that the amount of fluff in there seems to be just right for our dog. He also likes to paw at it sometimes, as dogs do with beds when they're nesting, and it has been perfectly durable so far! We give this bed a 10/10!

reviews.title: Beware of zipper
reviews.text: My puppy loves his bed and overall is very nice. I have bought two and he has become efficient at unzipping them and pulling all the stuffing out unfortunately.

reviews.title: Comfy Dog bed
reviews.text: I was unsure if this would be too big for my 10lb fur baby, but it is the perfect size! He has plenty of extra room and it’s super soft. I have washed numerous times in my front load washer and in my dryer and it has held its shape and did not come apart. When my fur baby needs a replacement I will definitely purchase this one again! Thank you for the great product!

reviews.title: Dogs love it!

Once opened, it seemed smaller in diameter even though it was a large like the brown.  It needed a bit of fluffing up and doesn't seem as comfy for them yet.  I would recommend this bed, my dogs love it, but it doesn't seem as full as the pictures.

reviews.title: Works like a charm, but not top-loading-washer safe
reviews.text:
This bed acts like some sort of calming drug for our 14-year-old dog, to the point where we check to make sure she’s breathing while asleep for MANY hours at a time. We actually have three of these beds (one upstairs, two downstairs), and they make everything easier, from long car trips to work-in-the-office days.

ONE MAJOR FAULT: The small bed with no removable cover does nor wash well with a TOP-LOADING washing machine. We used a front-loading one before, but no longer have access to it. From the first wash in the top-loading, ALL the shag on the outside booster became extremely matted. Luckily our dog doesn’t mind, but all three beds look terrible now. (The inside part turned out fine.) We did as instructed, washing each separately from other laundry. The mats are also not due to the dryer; they were there before drying. Unfortunate, but at least our dog doesn’t know the difference.

[[VIDEOID:59cd7c471a28401c08dc8f83bcb6f5fc]] I have a Chihuahua (who takes the largest bed obviously) , American Staffordshire Terrier, and a Red Heeler Cattle dog. They all love the bed and blanket. Although these photos of them are on the couch (I’m cleaning) they have stayed off the couches and actually lay on them on the floor.

The beds were surprisingly flimsy feeling as I’ve been used to buy heavy thick beds , however, my dogs absolutely love the beds and jumped in them immediately upon arrival.

If they love them and I love them. They do show up vacuum sealed in a bag but do fluff up as you can see over about a week even without drying them first as instructed. I would have dried them but they wouldn’t get out of them.

I recommend also buying the blankets that go with. The dogs like to bunch them around and then lay down and it has prevented them from tearing up the bottom of the bed. They also like being covered with the blankets.

reviews.title: Magic!
reviews.text: I foster and sit for dogs. I have many anxious pups in and out. This bed has been magic! One of my fosters hadn’t laid on a bed for the 8 months he was here. Enter THIS bed! It was only here for a few days before he got comfy on it.

reviews.title: Nice soft enveloping bed
reviews.text: Initially when I first took this bed out of the box, it was pretty easy to puff out, but my toy poodle didn't like it! I was shocked because typically she loves big fluffy beds! After a few hours,  I realized that she had a problem with the smell of the bed! Fortunately,  these beds are machine washable!! I washed it in my washing machine,  then dried it in the dryer. Boy, it really was fluffy when it came out of the dryer!! I put it down for her, and she snuggled up into her new super fluffy bed, and has deeply enjoyed it ever since!! Best dog bed I've purchased!!

reviews.title: Worth it !!
reviews.text:
I have spent hours and weeks reading reviews before finally pulling the trigger and buying this one. I went with the large bed .
I do not regret it!! My dog is a pit mix and he's about 8 years old. His old bed just wasn't doing it. It layed flat and he was always doing circles , we could tell he was uncomfortable. My dog would always find his way to the couch. I know some people allow dogs on couches and beds but I do not. Needless to say he hasn't been caught on the couch since purchasing this bed for him!

He snuggles right up in it and you can just tell how pleased he is ! He may to one typical circle , but he doesn't move much after he lays down. He is sleeping so well and he hardly gets up to greet us at the door when we get home!

The insert is very small. But the bed went nicely into the washer and dryer. It's very soft and more esthetically pleasing than most beds.

Definitely recommend!!

reviews.title: The shaggy version of this bed is dangerous!
reviews.text:
When we first got this bed, it was great, our 45 lbs dog loved it....a month or so in.... disaster! My dog like any other dog likes to spin a few times before settling, this day, she spun and her toes somehow became painfully tangled in the material and I had to hold her tightly in my arms while my husband had to eventually cut the fabric loose so we could untangle it from her toe. The other small version of this bed is a different ( and softer) material and my little dog loves it, even my big dog tries to sleep in it, which today, she somehow has successfully achieved. I was so upset that my big girl had to go through this trauma that I really wanted to give them a piece of my mind but unfortunately there was no seller contact available on Amazon, it was also too late to return it, so,

it was just a huge waste of money. I'm hoping someone from this company will see this review and contact me please, they need to know that the shag version can be dangerous for doggies......what if we weren't home when this happened?!

reviews.text: Yes it's soft and fluffy and cute, my dog even likes to lie in it BUT it's the worst bed for your dog's health. Every time my dog TRY's to get out of this bed she looks like a cripple. This bed has absolutely no support , it's a ball of fluff which is the worst thing for your dog's joints. If you care about the longevity of your pooch and want them to be pain free as they age, it's detrimental that they have a high quality FIRM foam mattress bed. Invest in a quality dog bed and check out Bigbarker.com or similar foam/orthopedic beds that will last the lifetime of your dog and extend theirs !

reviews.title: Easy care.  Snuggly soft.  Holds up well over time.
reviews.text: We've owned two of these beds for nearly a year now, and my dogs and I agree it's been a WONDERRUL choice.  Both my 5lb Yorkies love to snuggle and typically fit comfortably into one bed (size SMALL), but during warmer weather, the spoiled munchkins prefer to spread out and each have their own.  These beds are cute, and the neutral taupe color and shaggy style camouflage pretty well with our coastal décor.  But most of all, I LOVE that the entire beds can be thrown into the gentle wash cycle, and then they pop out of the dryer as fluffy and full as new.  I launder them about once a month, meaning these beds have held up extremely well for over a dozen or more washings now.  While my little dogs aren't destructive bed chewers or aggressive diggers, we've been VERY impressed with the durability, cute look, and cuddly comfort of these beds.  So glad we splurged for Best Friends by Sheri.

It is amazingly soft and comfortable for most pets as long as they don't roughly fluff their beds up.

While it’s not a horrible bed, it’s not as easy on their old bodies as I thought it would be. Needs more filling in the center where dogs will be laying.

reviews.text:
I bought this bed in the shag taupe and the deluxe chocolate in size Large, and my two dogs are absolutely IN LOVE with them. Seriously, my only regret in buying this is that my dogs sleep through the night in their own beds now, meaning less snuggles for me!

For size reference, my two girls are about 50-70 pounds and the Large gives them plenty of room to sprawl. I probably could have gotten the medium and still been fine—since they both tend to sleep curled up small—but I wanted to make sure my older girl could stretch if she needed to.

reviews.title: My puppy loved it so much, I bought another one within a couple of days
reviews.text: My year old puppy was destroying our dog beds by digging holes in the center of them.  When I saw this bed, I thought may be this is what she was trying to build for herself.  So I ordered one and she took to it within minutes, sleep soundly in it the first night and thereafter.  She has not tried to chew it up or remodel it for herself.  She seems to like the curve against her back and putting her head over the side.  The center is relatively thinner but that doesn't not appear to bother her.  I would HIGHLY recommend this bed.

This small bed is too big for my washer, and I am can't go to a laundry for a commercial front load washer to wash the whole thing - and hope it comes out well. I had already allowed my dog to have it before I discovered the cover was not removable.  The one plus is that the cover is incredibly soft. reviews.title: Disappointed in XL size lack of stuffing
reviews.text:
*** UPDATE... I took away 1 of the 2 stars I originally left because each day, I become more and more disappointed in this bed. My 7 month old Golden Retriever puppy, who is only 53 lbs, may as well be laying on a plain carpet because of having so little stuffing. It is nowhere NEAR how it appears in the photos and not even REMOTELY close to the 4 medium ones that we already own. I bought this because we had already purchased 4 of the medium ones, so with our new pup, I didn't hesitate to purchase the XL, figuring it would be of the same quality. I spent $99, to have to purchase more stuffing from the craft store, and open up seams and sew them back up. In the meantime, until I can do this project, the bed is useless. Extremely aggravated at this point!

***ORIGINAL...We have 4 beds in the medium size that we used for our Frenchie and our Boston Terrier. They washed well many times and were nice fluffy beds. Liking the brand so much, we purchased the XL for our Golden Retriever puppy and we are sadly disappointed. There is hardly any stuffing! The bed is loose and floppy and there is so little stuffing in the center, our dog may as well be laying on a blanket spread on the floor! After spending $99 on a bed, I shouldn't have to buy more stuffing and end up re-stuffing and sewing up the parts to make it comfortable for our dog. I had no idea that the quality would be so vastly different between sizes.

reviews.title: They changed these beds!!
reviews.text: I purchased this bed before and it was awesome. My dog loves it. It had a firm shell. Yeah, it was super soft. My dog would lay in it he just loved it. It felt really durable. Well he got sprayed by a skunk and laid in the bed and I had to throw it out. So I just went to my Amazon and I bought the same bed again the new bed is super flimsy the inner core is not the same as the old bed. The new bed feels way cheaper and it doesn’t have that inner core that was so durable and gave it. It’s like shell on the inside. I was very disappointed.

reviews.title: Shag version unsafe
reviews.text:
This bed started out great, I felt like I finally found the bed of my dogs dreams but then, the other day, when my dog did her usual circles to lay down, her foot got twisted up in the bed and when she tried to step off the bed her toe was so wound up in the material, I had to hold her ( to stop her from panicking) while my husband cut the bed to release her from it......this was all very dramatic at the time and I can't stop thinking about what might have happened if we weren't home at that moment.
All that said, my smaller dog has one of these also but the fabric is completely different and seems to fit the bed better with no lose fabric or shaggy material to get tangled in.
P.s.
I know the pictures above make the material look like it's two different colors but I assure you it's the same material from the same bed just in different lighting.

reviews.title: The best purchase EVER
reviews.text:
I looked at purchasing this bed for my 80 ish lbs boxer-ish mix for SO long. I checked on many different site and just couldn’t justify the purchase given the price tag. Also, my pup has full range access to whatever bed or sofa he feels like sleeping on in the house and his bed as well. Around the holidays there was a special and the bed was 50 percent off so I thought what the heck and purchased it. The best decision ever!!!

My husband and I both suffer with aches and pains because our baby sleeps in our bed every night. We tried so many different beds but ultimately he always makes his way to our bed. Since we have purchased this bed months he now (just about every night) sleeps in his bed and never makes his way to our bed!

Also, it’s really hard to find a size appropriate beds for larger dogs. I almost ordered the XL but went with the large and can not believe how perfectly he fit in it. With previous beds he seemed to never fit properly.

For additional support we placed it on top of an older orthopedic bed he had which I think really helps with comfort! (Our guys is up in age so definitely helped)

I was concerned about washing as I am a clean freak. I was also concerned with how it would wash. I wash every week and so far has washed and dried perfectly. The larger size beds completely come apart so you just wash the covers unlike what I have read with the smaller size.

It’s just a wonderful overall purchase and I have one happy rescue pup so happy with his new bed and happy dog parents too!

I opened the shipping box in his presence and, upon removing the bed from the vacuum sealed package, he started nibbling on the threads as I was separating them. “No, it’s not a toy. Wait five minutes.” And that was it! He sleeps soundly throughout the night! I’ve had dogs for much of my life and have never seen anything like this! Ten-star review! Today another came for our daughter’s cat. It’s still in the box but I have great expectations. I’ve recommended this bed to friends and complete strangers. But I DO miss my boy at night.

reviews.title: Wanted to love it more ...
reviews.text: We have two German shepherd dogs that love their comfort snuggles. We had previously bought a size L Sheri donut for our "smaller" dog on the Chewy site. We loved it so much - and so did our dog - that we thought we might as well get the XL version for our big dog too. Unfortunately, the XL came with not nearly the same quality stuffing as the Large. I'm not sure if this was because we bought it on Amazon versus Chewy, but needless to say we are disappointed. The inside round pad is flat as a pancake and doesn't fluff up. So far we have stuffed two blankets in it to make it more plush - otherwise you can feel the floor when you press on it. The cover is still great, soft and easy to remove and clean, and I love the color. Size is perfect too - but the stuffing has much to be desired. We really wanted to love it, but it wasn't exactly perfect out of the box. For the price, I really don't want to have to order another insert to make it the bed it should be.

reviews.text:
When I took it out of the package, I thought it would be too big. Actually, I have a very happy puppy. She loves to hang her head off the side, tuck her nose under the inside edge, and straighten all the way out. Blanket or no blanket, it's her favorite place to hang out now. She's an 8lb., 13-year-old Min-Pin, even with her arthritis there's plenty of cushion. I don't know if a larger dog would have the same experience, but we're quite satisfied.

It was obviously a return, the plastic bag had been opened and taped shut again, but the bed was fresh-smelling and puffed right up, so I don't mind.

One caveat on the durability: she seems to be so comfortable she doesn't want to get out of it to pee.
I've had to wash it five times since we got it 8 days ago, and it's taking quite a beating - we'll see how it holds up after another dozen washes and I'll come back with more info. I will say it washes easily and pops out of the dryer like new so far, I just worry she'll wear it out too soon. I'll buy it again anyway if she does wear it out; can't beat the price for this quality.

reviews.text: It is a challenge to get my Yorkie to not sleep with me (my fault, lol). She seems to be picky about her beds - now has three to choose from, ugghhh. I put one of my shirts in this bed to see if she would take to it and she did. Not sure if it is the softness or my shirt but she loves this bed. It is really soft, fluffy and has enough cushion and she can cuddle up in it. The size is perfect (she weighs 6-8lbs). I also followed the directions and put it in the dryer for 5 minutes after taking it out of the package and it became even more fluffy.

reviews.title: LIFE CHANGING BED!
reviews.text:
This bed completely changed the life of my rescue and me!

Kirk had major separation anxiety issues after being rescued. When I would leave the house he would take clothes from the hamper, my pillows and blankets from my bed, cushions off the couch, etc and pile them all in the living room and sleep or chew on them.

I ended up having to crate him when leaving the house.

After getting this bed, I no longer have to crate him! He is so happy and so much more relaxed! He no longer steals my clothes, he doesn't even sleep on the couch anymore. He absolutely adores this bed!

We are so happy with this purchase. Would buy time and time again. Totally worth it!

I broke out in a painful rash about 2 minutes after I pulled this thing out of the dryer for fluffing as instructed. I almost never have any kind of reaction to materials, scents, etc. You can feel that there is some kind of coating on the bed that easily rubs off which I haven’t noticed with past purchases. I can’t recommend the Shag Frost version.

reviews.text:

My skinny, lanky, 40 lb standard Poodle recently stole this bed from the cats after they knocked it off a sofa and onto the floor. She can fit though she does curl into a tight ball. I’m finally buying a second one a bit bigger just for her.

It washes well on a cold cycle. I always line dry anything plush so this hasn’t been put through the dryer. It’s survived several rounds of dry cat vomit, which is more than most beds we’ve had before managed.

Who knew that is all it would take?  So happy he finally likes it!

reviews.title: Destroyed after first wash
reviews.text: My dog loves this bed, unfortunately we washed it for the first time just outside the return window. I mistakenly thought the inner pad was dryable, but it definitely is not - only small size beds. The fluff exploded everywhere. Beyond that issue though, Fibers of the bed itself melted and matted on our lowest tumble dry setting. So disappointed!

reviews.title: Not Easy to Clean, don't be fooled
reviews.text: If  I could have given the feature titled "easy to clean" a negative rating, that would have been more appropriate. he main reason for buying this bed was because it was highly rated by others (yes my dogs love them) and it said it was easy to launder.  It's not, don't be fooled.  Maybe if it had zippers so you could wash the "cover" separately, without the cushions.  The cushions absorbed so much water in my fairly new front-loading machine that I had to "Spin" cycle 4 times, then put it in the laundry sink and physically push the water out with a 3 separate towels for over 10 minutes.  Then drying on low was a joke, I could have probably purchased a new bed for the electrical usage it took for one washing.  After 7 days, it is still damp on the bottom.  And this bed is for a dog; dogs puke.  Enough said.

As far as I can see it works for 😃 for both of us.
Highly recommend this bed. Thank you.

reviews.text: It’s crazy soft - in a very good way - our dog who is about 20 odd pounds - is considered a medium dog - thus we splurged & bought the medium sized bed. As you can tell by the photos - this allows our dog to stretch out & it also gives him the option of curling himself into a ball if he wants. The sweater he’s wearing (in case anyone is wondering) - was hand made by mom & is done in the traditional colors of the Hudson Bay Trading Company (aka “The Bay” for all the Canadians out there ‘eh) - it’s a great bed & well worth the 82%+ approval rating.

reviews.text:
Glad I ordered these beds! I bought 3 of them. Size 30” x 30”, our dogs are medium sized, weighing about 50-60 pounds each. The fit is perfect bc once they curl up inside, the bed wraps around them.

Soon as we took them out of the packages, all three dogs got inside immediately and took naps.

The blankets that comes with the beds are great add ons. All of dogs like to dig or make a nest in their beds before they settle so it’s great not having to pay additional for the blankets.

reviews.title: Item not vacuum sealed. :(
reviews.text:
Well the bed seems great so far. I was super excited as a first time dog owner to find this bed and wanting him to have the best. Unfortunately it did not arrive vacuum sealed and this was kind of a bummer. It’s not a huge deal but it makes me wonder if the product was used and returned or if any pathogens got trapped in the bed. Oh well , I’m just over protective of my puppy so I hope that’s not the case but I would of loved for it to arrive vacuum sealed since everything I read and watch about this bed tells me it should have.

Anyway…my Rocco seems a little hesitant about it at so far but I hope he grows to love it.

I will submit a part two after a day or two when he gets to test drive it.

Greetings!

She took right to it and seems to like the safe little space and will rest her chin on the edge. I can’t speak to how easy it will be to clean nor how durable it is (although she is not hard on beds and isn’t a chewer). I can say it is soft like a shaggy stuffed animal. The bed is pretty close to her fur in color so sometimes she “disappears “ in it! I would recommend this bed for dogs that need a secure, comforting little space.

reviews.text:
I’ve ordered about 6 of these beds over the years, they’ve always been extremely plush and hold up well. Unfortunately, with my most recent order the amount of filling in the center part of the bed is disappointing.

My dachshund normally loves these beds and will jump right in a new one. She won’t even use the new one I just ordered! I’ve compared the amount of plush in the center of her new bed vs her old beds there’s no comparison. The old ones are more full and cozy, the new one has minimal padding and I can feel the hard floor underneath it instead of filling.

My girls are loving this bed!!!

reviews.title: Plush, soft and probably more calming than other beds
reviews.text: Got the smallest size for my 5 lb toy poodle. Was concerned it was too big when I opened it but it seems to be the perfect size for her to sprawl out in. She loves it, the donut shape gives her a place to prop her head and feel contained, she also likes to bury her nose in the creases. The smallest size doesn't have a removable cover so you have to wash the whole bed. A removable cover would be nice to save space in the wash. I haven't washed it yet, though. My tiny dog has separation anxiety and this bed does seem to have a calming effect on her, she's very content in the bed.

reviews.title: Love this,  puppy approved!
reviews.text:
My puppy loves her new bed!
It came packaged in a box, all shrink wrapped, so it kept us shape well. My puppy hops right in, snuggles into it and stays there all night.
I had ordered a similar one from another company, it was horrible! It was an XL size for our lab.
It came in a shipping envelope type package and shrunk into a very small plastic bag, one of those you can buy at Walmart and use your vacuum to stick the air out, very unprofessional. The bed never came back to its correct shape. The company was horrible to deal with regarding a return.

I was hesitant to try one for my smaller dog, but I'm glad I did. This company sent a nice, good quality, bed, and it came within a week. It's easy to unzip and take it the "pillows" to make washing easier.
I'd order another one if needed.

reviews.title: Luxury pet bed
reviews.text: We’ve gone thru countless dog beds over the years and judging by how often our dog lays in bed now, I’d say this beats them all. She loves to burrow and sleep under a cover, and this bed and blanket allow her to do that. It isn’t heavily cushioned on the bottom but it is on the sides and it re-fluffs easily. The zipper could allow for stuffing with additional filler but we haven’t needed to do that.

She began sleeping there. After a few more days, I removed the blanket. She has been using the bed sans blanket ever since. She clearly loves sleeping in it. See photo!

I like the concept but the center round piece is very thin even after fluffing it in the dryer following the directions. It almost feels like just a thin layer and then you can feel the ground. I tested it out by just pushing on it with my hand. The border/side pieces are much more fuller with the stuffing compared to the center piece. Not sure if I got a faulty one but definitely wouldn’t buy it again for the price considering what we got. We have just been putting a thick blanket in it for extra cushion.

reviews.title: Extremely soft and cuddly!
reviews.text: My German Shepherd, Tegan, has multiple beds, i.e., Big Barker, all around the house. He loves to cuddle up on the pillows of those beds, so I thought I would try a bed with the "pillow" surrounding him. I took this picture as soon as I put the bed on the floor. He laid down, put his head on the pillow, and lights out! My dog is 120 pounds, and I was concerned that this bed would not be big enough regardless of the provided weight max listed for each size of every bed. My dog likes to stretch and lay across the beds, too. The XL bed (45" x 45") is plenty big for him and gives him enough space to stretch out if he so desires. It is day one, so we will see about the durability and washability. So far, so good!

He is sleeping sound and definitely LOVES this bed more then any other bed I have bought for him. As soon as it came I washed it and dried it and put it out. Washed and dried perfectly. Rudy Blu highly recommends this bed!

My cats are 9 lbs (the one in the picture) and 12 lbs. The small bed is the perfect size for them to lay in alone or together when they feel like cuddling! 10 out of 10 recommend for your pet!

reviews.title: Doggie's love it
reviews.text: My Doberman went to the doggie sitters for a visit. He took over on her dogs bed which happened to be this one.  She sent me pictures of my dog lounging and looking so happy.  I had to buy one for my buddy. So glad I did.  He is a happy camper. I highly recommend

reviews.title: My 90 pound dog loves it!
reviews.text: I’ll buy another when it needs replaced, because my 90 pound dog loves this bed.  Taking it apart to wash was easy, and it washed up like new.  The edge support seems to give comfort to my dog, and for a dog bed, it looks nice. Worth the $.

reviews.text: Bed cover was broke open right after the return window was closed. My dog didn’t try to pull it. Not durable, very disappointed.

reviews.title: Nothing better.
reviews.text:
Seriously I have a dog who EATS beds. He comfort chews them and I’ve had others before that are washable and either get gross and matted down or they shred. This will be my fourth Best Friends by Sherri bed. Not because I’m replacing them but because he needs them in every room. I bought two different sizes. A small for solo pup and a medium for sharability.
The material cleans like a breeze. I’ve had the hairy ones before too and could never get the smell of puke out of it after my dog got sick no matter how often I washed and they were so easy to get matted. But this other material is a masterpiece. Pop it in the wash and air dry every few weeks and it’s like new.

reviews.title: best cleanser I’ve tried for my dry skin
reviews.text: I live in a dry climate and have severely dry skin. Things were getting so bad that for a while I gave up on facial cleansers completely, because every one of the many “gentle” or “moisturizing” cleansers I tried left my face feeling tight, flaky, and irritated. I was opting to use nothing but warm water with a clean wash cloth on my face, which I am sure will make many skincare enthusiasts cringe, but my skin makes next to no oil and every other cleanser I tried burned. But, of course, even though I am not prone to acne, cleaning my face with warm water wasn’t working quite the way I wanted it to either. My face still felt and looked dry, and my pores were becoming larger and more noticeable. I decided to give this stuff a try because I like their lotion so much, and I am so glad that I did. It’s only a fraction of the price of some of the other cleansers I’ve tried, and I could feel a difference in my skin after the very first use. It didn’t burn and actually left my face feeling less dry than it was before I washed it, which is something I’ve never experienced before. I follow it up with the CeraVe daily moisturizer and no longer have fine lines or flakes in my skin, and my pores have been reduced and cleaned to make my skin tone much more even. I’d recommend this to anyone with dry or sensitive skin. It’s been a game changer for me.

reviews.title: No scent 👍🏻 and…
reviews.text:
It feels awesome.
Ordered on recommendation by a dermatologist. I have 70 yo dry skin and am beginning to show (and feel) my age.
Have always taken care of my skin but it seemed like something was lacking.

It is smooth and creamy to the touch and feels the same when applying to the damp skin. It doesn’t lather much, which is fine because who wants soap in their eyes?
My skin does feel softer after using it for over a week.
I don’t often wear makeup so I cannot tell if it is easily removes makeup.
It was also suggested to do a double cleanse for removing makeup. First an emollient make up remover (Vaseline or baby oil) and then gently washing with cleanser followed by a good humectant to moist skin.
This product is fragrance free so would work for sensitive skin, unless intolerant of ceramides.

reviews.text: I have used Cera-Ve for years. I like the way it cleans my skin.  Keeps the natural moisture barrier in place - won't dry your skin. I'm in my 50's, I've tried it all and I don't know another product - in any price range - that does the job so well. I have seen other reviews complaining that it doesn't remove makeup ... and it doesn't: it's not a makeup remover.  Use a makeup remover to  remove makeup, obviously.  Then use Cera-Ve to clean whatever garbage is in the makeup (and the makeup remover) off your skin.  It's an extra step, but so worth it if you don't want dry, flaky, itchy skin.

I do a double cleanse(cleansing oil followed by a regular cleanser) and with this, I had to go in with micellar water afterwards to remove the make-up residue left behind, and there was quite a bit. If you don't wear any make-up and don't want a deep cleanse, this might be great, but there are far better cleansers out there for dry skin than this one.

reviews.title: This stuff ruined my skin for two years!!!!!!!!
reviews.text:
Steer clear of this face wash.

I used the CeraVe Hydrating Face Wash for about a year during COVID while I was also wearing a mask regularly. I didn't put two and two together until recently when I decided to try aquafor on the acne that has been on my chin since I began using the face wash.

Little did I know, my skin barrier had been messed up from the clogging formula that the hydrating wash has. The main ingredient in this formula is the same as in many hair conditioners, hence why it would leave the result it did and nothing changed.

I have been battling with acne creams and other treatments and finally aquafor cleared up this acne (because of the damage to my skin barrier). It wasn't acne that I had been dealing with for these last two years, but the result of crappy, clogging product.

I had less issues with dark spots and such when I used both products, but I also think a serum (different brand) helped too. So, it combines well together, as well as, with an outside element. reviews.title: If you are alergic or reactant to Hyaluronic Acid, avoid this.
reviews.text:
First off, I will say that this is a cleanser, not a moisturizer, for those who are new to cleansing. This is definitely moisturizing to me, and very hydrating but not to moisturizing or hydrating.

I will say there are definitely other cleansers that are more expensive that would probably hydrate your skin even further than this... But for a basic cleanser, I'd say it is worth it.
A couple of things to note,

• If you are reactant or allergic to ceramides or hyaluronic acid, I would consider avoiding this cleanser.
• Cerave Hydrating cleanser also has Phenoxyethanol, which some people are also reacting to as well.
Ingredients:

• Aqua / Water / Eau,
• Glycerin,
• Cetearyl Alcohol,
• Peg-40 Stearate,
• Stearyl Alcohol,
• Potassium Phosphate,
• Ceramide Np, Ceramide Ap, Ceramide Eop,
• Carbomer,
• Glyceryl Stearate,
• Behentrimonium Methosulfate,
• Sodium Lauroyl Lactylate,
• Sodium Hyaluronate,
• Cholesterol,
• Phenoxyethanol,
• Disodium Edta,
• Dipotassium Phosphate.
Overall, I’d recommend this Cerave Hydrating face cleanser to anyone who doesn’t react to these Ingredients, or for those who want to give it a try.

reviews.title: Clean, Soft, Hydrated
reviews.text:
Everyone's skin is different, I tend to have fairly large pores, not oily, but also prone to an occasional breakout with acne. I'd say I'm on the lower end of the spectrum when it comes to acne at this point in my life.
I've used quite a few different face washes over the years, usually whatever I could get at the local grocery store or big box (Nutragena or Clear & Clear being my usual go-to). Most of them seem to dry my skin out, don't seem to clean very well, and strip all the natural oils from my skin.
Cerve is a completely different experience for me.
The product almost feels like washing your face with a light lotion(lol) ... It's actually very pleasant. Scent is almost none existant, and not required. My face is left feeling nice and clean but not stripped of my skins natural oils, soft and hydrated (just as the bottle says).
10/10 - recommended.

reviews.text:
I remember the first time I used this, a long day after school and I wanted to clean my face and relax. I used it, rubbed my fingers really well under my eyes, and put water. Nothing changed. Most of the concealer was still there. So I tried washing again, and it was still slightly there. I can tell because I have darker under eye circles and what it was after I washed was NOT it.
The feeling of it:
It’s thin. You put it on your face and it’s smooth and thin, and then you put water on it and it washes off right away. One swipe it’s gone (that should be the makeup, not the product itself). It shouldn’t be like that for a cleanser. I switched from La -rosche posay and I shouldn’t have. I still use this cerave cleanser since I don’t have any other one currently, and it doesn’t do anything bad to your skin, but I use African black soap after because of how ineffective it is. It still is a cleanser though, just not as good as other ones and definitely not a good first.

reviews.text:
I had a number of hats lying around the house that I had not touched in a while due to how dirty they were. Tossing them directly in the washer usually damaged the hat's form and washing them by hand did not seem as effective as this usually resulted in missing a spot or two.

I purchased the hat washer as a last resort for some of my hats and have been pleasantly surprised. The washer is strong enough to maintain the hat's form. It secures the hat very well as it goes through a cycle but still allows breathing room for the water and soap to do its magic.

I have ran 5-6 hats with this washer and the hats have come out looking as good as new. The one pictured had a ton of sawdust that would have taken me ages to clean by hand. This thing is a lifesaver and I highly recommend it.

Ok, I've seen these things advertised here and there for AGES now but never paid it much attention because like a lot of As Seen on TV type stuff, you end up using it a few times then it collects dust. I have a big hats/caps collection and my favorites are either the really dark colored ones or whites. As yall know those 2 colors it's so hard to keep clean so I don't wear them often. The black ones I wear is a dust magnet... the white ones I wear just takes a day of sweating in it and it'll leave water mark/lines. I've tried hat cleaners and though they work on most colors, on whites it just makes them worse.

About a month ago I got a HORRIBLE haircut, so I relied on hats everyday. And while doing so there were many times I couldn't match perfectly because a particular hat color combo would have a small stain or something on it. I decided you know what? Let's just get one of these and try it, I've got nothing to lose but $15 and maybe a hat. As soon as it arrived I tried it right away and much to my surprise, it WORKS AMAZING!! That same evening I did 6 hats total, all different colors with different dirty marks and all but one came out looking like brand new (just not as crisp but thats as expected). My black hats never looked better! Some of my hats with whites looks 90% better, I think another run will make it perfect.. or maybe treat it first with a strain remover. I'm soooo happy with this purchase it's crazy that I didn't consider it all these years!!

reviews.title: It retains the hat's shape!
reviews.text:
I was a bit hesitant to wash my hat in a dishwasher but decided to give it a try. I did two hats, one used for yard work which had a lot of dirt debris, and my daily hat which had sweat stains throughout but was afraid it could lose its fit and shape. The instructions recommend a normal wash cycle to avoid hot water, but my dishwasher does not have that option so it used hot water, which I was afraid it could mess with the shape and fit. I did stop the cycle when it tried to heat dry, as the instructions recommend air-drying instead and avoiding the heat dry feature of the dishwasher.
Both hats came out really clean and almost looking new again. (make sure to use non-acidic dish soap per instructions). One of the hats originally had a weird shape, and this re-shaped it with a better fit.

Pros about the item
- Keeps the hat in good shape and does not shrink or wrinkle the fit of the hat.
- Can help re-shape hats with a bad fit.
- Does not accidentally open during a clean cycle as it has a good firm fit.

Cons about the item
- The close pins are sometimes a bit hard to open, but this helps keep it closed while washing.

reviews.title: DO NOT BUY. IT WILL RUIN YOUR CAP.
reviews.text:
2nd time using it and the cage warped toward the right.

I think it's the washer's spin at the end that caused it.

The 1st time I sued it, my hat (not pictured) was twisted and somewhat folded at an angle. I though I had not locked the thing or maybe had mounted the hat incorrectly.

I watched videos, read and followed instructions for this 2nd use. GARBAGE!

It is currently 5 hours or so since I used it today and it's still lopsided. Not as bad as it was when it first came out of the washer, but definitely off-center. I included pics of the hat. Notice the creases that run from bottom-left to top-right. And the zoomed pic, notice that the actual front of the cap (the hard part) is bent inward.

BRAND NEW cap. No more than 3 wks. 1st wash.

DO NOT BUY THIS PRODUCT! IT WILL RUIN YOUR CAP!

The other complaint is that the section for the bill is flat.
